name: Sync Steering on Doc Edit
description: When the main project context doc or context log is edited, remind the agent to check if the steering file needs updating.

then.prompt: A project context file was just edited. Review the changes and check if 'c:\Users\manni\OneDrive\Homebrew_dev\.kiro\steering\595bowershub-project.md' needs to be updated to reflect any new decisions, infrastructure changes, completed items, or new planned features. Only update it if something meaningful changed — don't make trivial edits.
